original_question:
Let the function $f(x)= \begin{cases} 2^{x}-4, & x > 0 \\ -x-3, & x < 0\end{cases}$. If $f(a) > f(1)$, then the range of the real number $a$ is \_\_\_\_\_\_.

Present the answer in LaTex format: \boxed{Your answer}
